Footer.tagline: The services marketplace built for Africa. Simple, secure, professional.
Footer.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of professionals and clients across Africa.

Home.heroDesc: Find qualified professionals for all your projects. Secure payments, guaranteed delivery, responsive support.
Home.howSubtitle: Four simple steps for your project
Home.step1Desc: Find the right service among hundreds of providers.
Home.step2Desc: Chat directly with the seller to refine your project.
Home.step3Desc: Pay securely. Your money is protected until delivery.
Home.step4Desc: Approve the delivery when satisfied and leave a review.
Home.whySubtitle: A platform built to inspire trust
Home.trustSecureDesc: Your money is held in escrow and only released upon delivery.
Home.trustVerifiedDesc: Vetted profiles, authentic reviews, and trust badges.
Home.trustDeliveryDesc: Every step of your order is visible in real time.
Home.trustSupportDesc: A team available to solve any issue quickly.
Home.ctaClientDesc: Browse hundreds of services and find the perfect provider in a few clicks. Free sign-up.
Home.ctaSellerDesc: Join the platform, create your profile and start receiving orders today.

About.title: About {appName}
About.subtitle: The professional services marketplace built for Africa. Simple, secure, accessible.
About.missionP1: {appName} was born from a simple observation: African talent is immense, but the tools to make it accessible are sorely lacking. Too many talented freelancers struggle to find clients, and too many project owners don't know where to find the right providers.
About.missionP2: Our mission is to bridge the gap between supply and demand for professional services in Africa, by eliminating the usual friction points: trust, payment, and communication.
About.forClients: For clients — entrepreneurs, SMEs, individuals — looking for reliable providers for their design, development, writing, marketing, video, and other projects.
About.forSellers: For providers — freelancers, agencies, creatives — who want to showcase their skills, receive orders and get paid simply and securely.
About.valueAfricaDesc: Local payment methods, optimized connectivity, simple French interface.
About.valueTrustDesc: Escrow payments, verified sellers, transparent dispute resolution.
About.valueSimpleDesc: An experience designed for everyone, even users unfamiliar with technology.
About.valuePerfDesc: Fast application, even on the slowest mobile connections.
About.joinDesc: {appName} is growing fast. Whether you're a client or a provider, we'd love to welcome you.

Contact.title: Contact us
Contact.subtitle: A question, a problem, a suggestion? Our team is listening.
Contact.emailDesc: Send us a message via the form below or at support@marketplace.com.
Contact.messagingDesc: If you have an account, use the built-in messaging for faster follow-up.
Contact.responseDesc: We typically reply within 24 to 48 business hours.

Search.title: Results for "{query}"
Search.description: Find the best services for "{query}" on our marketplace.
Search.defaultDescription: Browse and filter hundreds of professional services.
Search.noResultsDesc: No services match your criteria. Try broadening your filters or using different keywords.
